dashboard.label: MITRE ATLAS Coverage Heatmap
dashboard.description: Full MITRE ATLAS technique coverage map across all 16 tactics. Drill into any technique for full detail and Splunk correlation search.

search.query: `acme_genai_index` earliest=$time_range.earliest$ latest=$time_range.latest$ framework.technique_id=AML.* | stats dc(framework.technique_id) as count
`acme_genai_index` earliest=$time_range.earliest$ latest=$time_range.latest$ framework.tactic_id=AML.* | stats dc(framework.tactic_id) as count
`acme_genai_index` earliest=$time_range.earliest$ latest=$time_range.latest$ framework.cvss_score=* | stats avg(framework.cvss_score) as avg_cvss | eval avg_cvss=round(avg_cvss,2)
`acme_genai_index` earliest=$time_range.earliest$ latest=$time_range.latest$ framework.real_world_incident=* NOT framework.real_world_incident="" | stats dc(framework.technique_id) as count

chart.title: ATLAS Technique Frequency Heatmap by Tactic

search.query: `acme_genai_index` earliest=$time_range.earliest$ latest=$time_range.latest$ framework.tactic_name=* framework.technique_id=AML.* | stats count by framework.tactic_name framework.technique_id | eval label=framework.tactic_name + " / " + framework.technique_id | sort -count
`acme_genai_index` earliest=$time_range.earliest$ latest=$time_range.latest$ framework.kill_chain_stage=* | stats count by framework.kill_chain_stage | sort -count

`acme_genai_index` earliest=$time_range.earliest$ latest=$time_range.latest$ framework.cvss_score=* | eval cvss_bucket=case(framework.cvss_score>=9.0,"9.0-10.0 Critical",framework.cvss_score>=7.0,"7.0-8.9 High",framework.cvss_score>=4.0,"4.0-6.9 Medium",1=1,"0-3.9 Low") | stats count by cvss_bucket | sort cvss_bucket
`acme_genai_index` earliest=$time_range.earliest$ latest=$time_range.latest$ framework.attack_vector=* | stats count by framework.attack_vector | sort -count

`acme_genai_index` earliest=$time_range.earliest$ latest=$time_range.latest$ framework.technique_id=AML.* framework.severity=$severity_filter$ | stats count AS events, max(framework.cvss_score) AS max_cvss, dc(agent.id) AS agents, values(defenseclaw_action) AS dc_actions, values(agent.id) AS agent_list BY framework.technique_id framework.technique_name framework.tactic_name framework.kill_chain_stage framework.severity | eval max_cvss=round(max_cvss,1) | eval agents_str=mvjoin(agent_list," | ") | eval dc_str=mvjoin(dc_actions," | ") | sort -max_cvss | table framework.technique_id framework.technique_name framework.tactic_name framework.kill_chain_stage framework.severity max_cvss events agents dc_str | rename framework.technique_id AS "Technique ID", framework.technique_name AS "Technique Name", framework.tactic_name AS "Tactic", framework.kill_chain_stage AS "Kill-Chain Stage", framework.severity AS "Severity", max_cvss AS "Max CVSS", events AS "Events", agents AS "Agents", dc_str AS "DefenseClaw Actions"

`acme_genai_index` earliest=$time_range.earliest$ latest=$time_range.latest$ framework.maestro_layers=* | mvexpand framework.maestro_layers | search framework.maestro_layers=L* | stats count AS events, max(framework.cvss_score) AS max_cvss, dc(framework.technique_id) AS techniques BY framework.maestro_layers | lookup acme_maestro_layers_lookup layer_id AS framework.maestro_layers OUTPUTNEW name description | eval max_cvss=round(max_cvss,1) | eval risk_level=case(max_cvss>=9.0,"🔴 CRITICAL",max_cvss>=7.0,"🟠 HIGH",max_cvss>=4.0,"🟡 MEDIUM",1=1,"🟢 LOW") | sort framework.maestro_layers | table framework.maestro_layers name risk_level events techniques max_cvss description | rename framework.maestro_layers AS "Layer", name AS "Layer Name", risk_level AS "Risk Level", events AS "Events", techniques AS "Techniques", max_cvss AS "Max CVSS", description AS "Description"
